review_rationale: Residual-blind source/protocol review. The supplied ledgers support using RHI/Rdisk, Vflat, H I mass, and inclination as source-side spin/envelope proxy fields. I prefer the Bullock-like disk conversion route because it respects the definition-boundary warning that published disc lambda context must not be directly inserted into the beta_cl halo/envelope slot. This response does not use endpoint residuals, endpoint scores, baseline ranks, or post-hoc curve-improvement reasoning, and it does not validate Tau Core by itself.
